About Organization

The Haryana Staff Selection Commission (HSSC) is responsible for conducting recruitment exams for various government jobs in Haryana.

For more information, visit the HSSC Official Website.

About the Programme

The Haryana HSSC Primary Teacher PRT Recruitment 2024 is a government job opportunity for primary teachers in Haryana.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for primary teacher positions in Haryana.
